<Badge text="vue-best-practices" variant="note" /> <Badge text="18 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add hyf0/vue-skills --skill vue-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/vue-best-practices`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/vue-best-practices.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add hyf0/vue-skills --skill vue-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

MUST be used for Vue.js tasks. Strongly recommends Composition API with &lt;script setup&gt; and TypeScript as the standard approach. Covers Vue 3, SSR, Volar, vue-tsc.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add hyf0/vue-skills --skill vue-best-practices -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[hyf0/vue-skills](https://github.com/hyf0/vue-skills)

## Comparable Alternatives

General purpose agent skills in similar domain (see catalog for alternatives); e.g. other SQL or UI or infra skills.

&gt; Web-augmented from public upstream SKILL.md (github raw fetches) and curated config/external-skills.md; use external-skill-auditor for live evidence and script/hook audit. Not an endorsement. Confidence 0.75 derived from metadata alignment + source inspection depth.
